meaning: n.(矿工)头上戴的小型照明灯
examples: My LED headlamp lit the white sand dune.
Flashlight or headlamp, just in case.
As dusk turns to darkness, Álvares snaps on an infrared headlamp and we continue hiking intothe hills.
He pulled survivors onto his airboat and turned his headlamp skyward so rescue helicopters could find the crash.
In the upper trim levels you can get LED headlamps that tuck under the headlamp assembly like beaded eyelashes.
